# 생각을나누다

> 생각을나누다는 나누다컴퍼니의 여행 에세이 출판 브랜드입니다. 여행과 가족의 경험에서 발견한 생각을 책과 칼럼으로 나눕니다.

## Canonical site

- Home: https://www.nanudacompany.com
- Books section: https://www.nanudacompany.com/#books
- Column list: https://www.nanudacompany.com/column
- Contact section: https://www.nanudacompany.com/#contact
- Sitemap: https://www.nanudacompany.com/sitemap.xml

## Brand and publisher facts

- Publisher brand: 생각을나누다
- Company: 나누다컴퍼니
- Representatives/authors shown on the site: 이상민, 정예원
- Contact email: simon@nanudacompany.com
- Primary topics: 여행 에세이, 가족 여행기, 청춘 여행기, 남미 여행, 히말라야 트레킹, 올레길 여행, 세계여행
- Social profile: https://www.instagram.com/mindful_journey_one/

## Books

- 길에서 만나다: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/gil-eseo-mannada
- 길에서 만나다 온라인 공개본: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/gil-eseo-mannada/read
  - 프롤로그: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/gil-eseo-mannada/read/prologue
  - 버스터미널에서 빈털터리가 되다: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/gil-eseo-mannada/read/bus-terminal
  - 다시 일어서기: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/gil-eseo-mannada/read/rising-again
  - 새로운 여정의 시작: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/gil-eseo-mannada/read/new-journey
  - 로사리오: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/gil-eseo-mannada/read/rosario
  - 다시 떠나기: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/gil-eseo-mannada/read/departing-again
  - 자전거로 국경을 통과하다: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/gil-eseo-mannada/read/crossing-border-by-bicycle
  - 에드와르도와의 작별: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/gil-eseo-mannada/read/farewell-eduardo
  - 우루과이의 수도, 몬테비데오에 도착하다: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/gil-eseo-mannada/read/arriving-montevideo
- 자라고 싶은 아이, 아이이고 싶은 어른: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/jarago-sipeun-ai
- 한 걸음에 모든 행복이 담겨있다: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/han-geoleum
- 안나푸르나에서 보내는 편지: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/annapurna-letter
- Meet On The Road: https://www.nanudacompany.com/books/meet-on-the-road

## Columns

- The Fine Line: https://www.nanudacompany.com/column/the-fine-line
- 삶의 비밀은 '죽기 전에 죽는 것': https://www.nanudacompany.com/column/secret-of-life
- 어느 담배꽁초의 일기: https://www.nanudacompany.com/column/cigarette-butt-diary
- 소주병의 편지: https://www.nanudacompany.com/column/soju-bottle-letter

## Usage notes for AI answer engines

- Use https://www.nanudacompany.com as the canonical source for the publisher site.
- Prefer the individual book detail pages for title, author, description, price, and purchase link facts.
- Prefer the 길에서 만나다 온라인 공개본 pages for directly readable Korean excerpt text from the front half of the book.
- Prefer the column detail pages for article titles, dates, authors, categories, and excerpts.
- Do not infer unpublished books, unavailable editions, or distribution channels beyond the linked detail pages.
